description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests-dev-preview that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a Couchbase service, install the build environment and dependencies, check out the repository with submodules, set up Ruby 2.6, initialize Couchbase, compile an extension, display the library version, check the Couchbase cluster, and run tests with a 15-minute timeout.
